% The control for E1's W deficit: a W specialist trained on exactly the joint's
% W experience (333 updates x 20 envs = the joint's 6,667 W episodes), same
% architecture, same seeds, same everything but the budget. The envelope
% explanation needs no experiment to refute: the specialist trains with the same
% delta = 0. This separates the two explanations that survive it.
\newcommand{\WcThirdUpdates}{333}  % updates of the experience-matched W specialist
\newcommand{\WcMatchedDelta}{0.46}\newcommand{\WcMatchedLo}{+0.06}\newcommand{\WcMatchedHi}{+0.86}  % joint vs the experience-matched specialist (EQUIVALENT)
\newcommand{\WcBudgetCost}{+0.98}\newcommand{\WcBudgetLo}{+0.58}\newcommand{\WcBudgetHi}{+1.38}  % what dropping to a third of the budget costs a W specialist
\newcommand{\WcSeedLo}{-0.34}\newcommand{\WcSeedHi}{+1.57}  % the per-seed spread of joint-minus-matched, which straddles zero
\newcommand{\WcVerdict}{equivalent}
\newcommand{\WcFullDelta}{1.42}\newcommand{\WcFullLo}{+1.06}\newcommand{\WcFullHi}{+1.78}  % joint vs its FULL specialist, recomputed here as a check on E1 (INFERIOR)
